Photos showed a 1 bedroom place and I got a studio. They charged me $60 when I was there for less than 2 hours after I figured out what was going on. Also WAY over priced. I stayed at Eastin Grand by the airport for the same price and it was excellent.

reviews.title: Disappointment
reviews.text:
I stayed once last year and liked the room with its location near the places I planned to visit, so I booked again this year. This time I booked a deluxe room, which costs nearly 1 million VND per night during regular days, but I was given a room that looked nothing like a makeshift storage room prepared for guests during peak season. The room was dark, the floor was a dirty black, and the bed sheets were also dirty; it was completely different from the pictures. I was extremely disappointed upon entering. I couldn't stand it, so after about 10 minutes, I had to report to the staff to change rooms, but they said there were no other rooms available, so they transferred me to another branch. Since I had other plans and was already tired from moving from Phan Thiet, having to transfer to another branch took time and affected my mood quite a bit. Later, I was assisted with the transfer to the other branch, but due to the bad impression from before, I was still uncomfortable and cautious about cleanliness. I hope you improve your services and facilities so that no other guests have to face a situation like mine.

As for the staff, there were no issues; everyone was very cheerful and helpful, resolving my problems quickly.
reviews.response:
Thân chào quý khách,

Cảm ơn chị đã tiếp tục lựa chọn M Village và dành thời gian chia sẻ những trải nghiệm rất chi tiết vừa qua.

M Village thật sự lấy làm tiếc khi kỳ nghỉ lần này lại mang đến cho chị cảm giác không thoải mái, đặc biệt là về chất lượng phòng cũng như sự bất tiện khi phải di chuyển sang chi nhánh khác. M Village hiểu rằng sau một hành trình dài, ai cũng mong được nghỉ ngơi trong không gian đúng như mong đợi — và rất tiếc vì điều đó đã không diễn ra trọn vẹn.

Tuy nhiên, M Village cũng xin cảm ơn chị vì đã ghi nhận thái độ phục vụ và sự hỗ trợ từ đội ngũ nhân viên. Đây là động lực để chúng tôi tiếp tục nỗ lực cải thiện hơn nữa về cơ sở vật chất và quy trình sắp xếp phòng, nhằm phục vụ tốt hơn trong những dịp cao điểm.

Hy vọng M Village vẫn sẽ có cơ hội chào đón chị quay lại trong thời gian tới, với một trải nghiệm tích cực và dễ chịu hơn.

reviews.title: A very nice oasis
reviews.text:
There is no way you will find this place just driving by even though it’s 50 m off a major highway. It is a tranquil, refreshing, spot, where I never would’ve expected one.

I only interacted with one of the staff, and she was wonderfully helpful. I have no way to know for sure, but I’m guessing the rest of the staff is the same.

I booked the suite, and it was well worth the small bump in price.  My only disappointment with the entire experience was the shower. The water pressure was great and there was a lot of hot water, but having lived in Vietnam for nine years, I know that they used the cheapest possible showerhead. This property and this room is much better suited to the overhead rain shower showerhead with an auxiliary handheld.

Since I was only there for one night, this was not a huge thing, but have I been there for longer, it would’ve been.

If they were to fix this one defect, I would stay here regularly.

Staff was amazing and super helpful and nice! But for the room...

If you're in the studio, i would avoid room 104. It's essentially a dungeon with no natural lighting, and damp smell(imagine a damp basement) from the window that opens up to nothing but an enclosed dirt section (so moisture is trapped in here and there's mushrooms growing out of it too!)

The amenities are clean, and I'm sure the other rooms are great. I like MVillage's other properties like Thao Dien's but this studio was a huge disappointment.

reviews.title: Short break
reviews.text:
Staff very friendly and helpful 10 points. Has kitchen, fridge and cooking facilities were good but no coffee cups or coffee provided limited  cooking puts an cutlery no cutting board no sharp knife or colander or pealers very basic utensils rooms get cleaned every 2 days that's 3 days from check in. Was clean and comfortable no bottled water provided but much better filtered water from machine in Foyer. Washing machine and dryer with liquid soap provided in common location up stairs for everyone to use but staff happy to assist. Good WhatsApp Messenger communication with staff. 
Stayed 4 nights was good value for money book a week ahead or more for room discounts. 
A request for Late check out was given 30 mins more and could sit in nice garden until we went to our other booking. 
We would stay again
Thank you to all the staff you are very kind and helpful

reviews.title: Thank you, thank you, thank you!
reviews.positives:
This is probably the most peaceful hotel complex in the whole of Sài Gòn. Surprisingly, you can't even hear the nearby road at any time. Everything is so beautiful and well-kept that I would have loved to stay there forever. The surroundings are great. There are lots of little street food places to discover. I liked the fact that it's not so touristy all around. And yet you can be in the middle of the city in 10-15 minutes.
I was in Sài Gòn for a project. As I don't speak the language, I made countless inquiries to the staff. They - namely Ngô Vũ, Tôn My and Nguyễn Ngân - took their time every single time and were a great help to me. reviews.title: It feels like a hotel that you've come to in the southern country!
reviews.text:
The poolside surrounded by trees that evoke a tropical feel, just like its name, Tropic. The building is also orange, giving it a tropical ambiance.

The room has a stylish urban single-living vibe. It includes a refrigerator, microwave, and kettle, allowing for some cooking. There is also a common washing and drying machine, making it suitable for long stays.

For first-time visitors to Ho Chi Minh, it might feel a bit far from the city, but you can reach the city center for about 300 yen by taxi. There are convenience stores, coffee shops, ice cream shops, and authentic seafood restaurants nearby. By the way, as I was lacking exercise, I even walked to District 1.

The staff is friendly. Those who couldn't communicate verbally made an effort with mobile translation tools. With high-speed Wi-Fi available, I had no issues working.

Ultimately, I stayed for five nights and it was very good.

reviews.title: Very good
reviews.text:
Pros: 
Inside the hotel courtyard there are nice seating areas and tropical garden. 
The room is clean and there is a kitchen with everything. One can use it well to make meals.
Cons:
The Main Street is very wide and there is no pedestrian bridge to cross the street. To cross one has to walk to the next intersection and back. This is not a neighborhood to easily walk and enjoy cafes and small shops.
The reception desk was always empty. No one was there most of the time, at least when I was there, maybe because it was the weekend.
Except for the garden, there isn’t a public indoor area like a lounge for a short waiting time.
reviews.response:
Dear Qinwen,

Thank you for sharing such detailed feedback about your stay. We’re delighted to know you enjoyed the tropical garden and found the room clean and well-equipped for preparing meals.

We’re sorry to hear that the location and limited reception hours caused some inconvenience during your visit. Your comments are truly valuable, and we’ll take them into consideration to improve our guest experience, especially in providing clearer communication and more comfortable common areas.

We sincerely appreciate your understanding and hope to have the chance to welcome you back for an even more pleasant stay.

Warm regards,
Customer service of M Village

reviews.title: Nice hotel!
reviews.text: Such a lovely and stylish place! It feels like a tropical escape from the city bustle. The greenery and the quiet pool area are rare gems in Saigon. My room was very comfortable, clean, and well-designed. I’ve stayed here several times now and always sad to leave. Huge thanks to the wonderful staff, especially Nguyen, for being so helpful and welcoming.
reviews.response:
Dear Viktor,

Thank you for staying with M Village and for your high rating. We’re happy to know you had a good experience and sincerely hope to welcome you back on your next visit.

Best regards
Customer service of M Village

reviews.title: Hidden gem in the busy city
reviews.text:
We enjoyed every aspect of our stay - from friendly service, to clean room, access to laundry and cosy green environment. In the inner yard place for bbq and table to eat if you order takeaway. Small and clean swimming pool, good to refresh during hot day. 
Just 15-20 minutes by car to the busy 1st district and feels already like tropical island hotel.   

Will stay there again when in Ho Chi Minh.
reviews.response:
Dear Daria,

Thank you very much for sharing such a lovely review of your stay with us.

We’re truly delighted to hear that you enjoyed every aspect of your time here — from our friendly service and clean room to the cosy green surroundings and convenient laundry facilities. It’s wonderful to know that the inner yard, BBQ area, and small swimming pool helped create a relaxing, tropical island–like atmosphere for you and your family, even within the busy city.

We’re also glad that the location allowed you to enjoy a peaceful retreat while still being within easy reach of District 1. Thank you for your kind words and for choosing to stay with us. We very much look forward to welcoming you back on your next visit to Ho Chi Minh City.

Warm regards,
Customer service of M Village

reviews.title: Thất vọng (Disappointed)
reviews.text:
1. When we took a shower,  we found out the hotel didn't prepare towels in room.
2.We tried to contact front desk, but found out there is no telephone in room.
3.So we had to walk out searching for towels.
4.There is no tv in room,  this doesn't match the level of price. 
5.When we checked out in afternoon, there is no one on the front desk, so we had to wait for more 5 mins.
reviews.response:
Warmest greeting from M Village. Thank you for bringing this matter to our attention. Upon receiving your feedback, we promptly addressed the matter with our team and we definitely is focusing on improving this point you mentioned.

Once, M Village would like to apologize for any inconvenience this might have caused you. We would hope that you would give us another chance to make your stay as best as it can be. We do hope that we will have the pleasure of welcoming you back in the near future

Best regards,
Customer Service M Village

reviews.title: 環境嘈雜
reviews.text: 房間乾淨，夠大。但可能是安排的房間位置，早上5點開始聽的到外面的聲音。夜班員工睡覺打呼聲大到可以吵醒房間的我。重視睡眠品質的要考慮。除此之外，一切都還行。最重要一點，此飯店外國人要入住的話不接受除護照外一切證件…..Agoda沒有註明，也是蠻爛的
reviews.response:
Dear Chun,

Thank you for taking the time to share your feedback. We’re glad to hear that you found our room clean and spacious, though we sincerely apologize for the disturbance caused by noise during your stay. Your comments have been shared with our team to review and ensure better sound control, especially during the night hours.

Regarding the check-in policy, we truly regret any inconvenience caused. As per local government regulations, foreign guests are required to present a valid passport for verification, and we will work with our booking partners to make this information clearer on the listing.

We appreciate your valuable feedback and hope to have another opportunity to provide you with a more pleasant and restful experience in the future.

Warm regards,
Customer service of M Village Team

reviews.title: 人員與清潔待加強
reviews.text:
一到飯店沒看到人，找不到人Check in。
房間的水壺底部污垢沒有清潔。
以價格來說算還是勉強可以接受！
reviews.response:
Dear Valued Guest,

Thank you for sharing your feedback. We sincerely regret any confusion upon your arrival. Our accommodation follows a self-service model, where staff are available on call to assist with check-in rather than having a traditional front desk. Once guests notify us of their arrival, our team promptly comes to provide assistance.

Regarding the cleanliness issue with the kettle, we apologize for any oversight and will reinforce our cleaning procedures to maintain high standards.

We appreciate your understanding and hope to welcome you again for a more seamless experience.

Best regards,
Customer service of M Village

reviews.title: Excellent
reviews.text: 位置在巷子裡很安靜，但房間外如果有人經過說話都聽得到。廁所有蟑螂，通知服務人員很快就過來處理並且換房間，服務很棒，有需求都會即時回覆
reviews.response:
Dear YI-HSIN,

Thank you very much for your kind review and for choosing to stay with us.

We are truly delighted to know that you appreciated the quiet location and, most importantly, the prompt support from our team during your stay. Your kind words about our service and responsiveness mean a lot to us.

At the same time, we sincerely apologize for the inconvenience caused regarding the noise and the issue you encountered in the bathroom. This is certainly not the experience we aim to provide. Please rest assured that your feedback has been shared with our team for further review and improvement.

We are grateful for your understanding and glad that our team was able to assist you promptly and arrange a room change to make your stay more comfortable.

Thank you once again for your valuable feedback. We truly hope to have the pleasure of welcoming you back for an even better experience in the future.

Warm regards,
Customer service of M Village
